creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Piotr Smyrak from comment #6)
The second error noted on Comment #3 still persists even with your patch on Poudriere.
But graphics/gthumb is built fine on bare-metal environment using `make && make package` with the exactly same option as poudriere.

  *I have /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/options as the symlink
   pointing to /var/db/ports/, so all options are exactly the same.

Maybe some BUILD_DEPENDS are missing to generate the mentioned file.
